name: saludlink
comment-pg-god: Declared at the workspace root (not just apps/medusa) because @medusajs/test-utils@2.16 does a bare `require('pg-god')` to create/drop the throwaway integration DB but fails to declare it — a packaging bug. A root devDependency lands in the top-level node_modules where test-utils resolves it, without needing a public-hoist-pattern (which would force a full node_modules purge). Tasks 23/24.

pnpm.comment-types-react: Single @types/react across the monorepo. Medusa's admin runtime stays on react@18 (runtime, not types); pinning the DefinitelyTyped stubs to 19 stops a stray 18 copy from merging into the storefront's type program and breaking JSX component types (TS2786).
pnpm.comment-security-overrides: Force patched versions of framework-transitive deps flagged by `pnpm audit` (GHSA advisories). lodash: code-injection via _.template (pulled by @medusajs/cli>graphql-codegen). @opentelemetry/propagator-jaeger: DoS (pulled by medusa telemetry). sharp: libvips CVEs (next image optimization). Tracked by Dependabot; remove once the framework updates.
pnpm.comment-medusa-types: Pin @medusajs/types to a single version across the monorepo. The storefront's `latest` @medusajs/* deps (js-sdk/ui/types) can resolve @medusajs/types to a newer minor (2.17.x) than the 2.16.0 the js-sdk actually uses, producing two copies whose StoreCart/StoreOrder types are structurally identical but nominally distinct → TS2322 in cart.ts/orders.ts. Force 2.16.0 (the runtime the app is built against).

auditConfig.comment-ignore: GHSA-fx2h-pf6j-xcff (vite server.fs.deny bypass) affects vite<6.4.3, but Medusa's admin bundler is pinned to vite 5 — bumping to vite 6 breaks the admin build. This is a DEV/BUILD-server-only vuln (vite does not run in production; the admin is a pre-built static bundle). Tracked by Dependabot for when Medusa moves to vite 6.
